name: intouchnow-ai-call-processing
description: Backend technical test for processing patient call transcripts into structured actions.

scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test OPENAI_API_KEY=test-key OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini node --test -r ts-node/register app/test/unit/*.test.ts app/test/integration/*.test.ts
